name: How is fault determined in a workplace accident with third party in Boise?

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined in a workplace accident with third party in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp ignores fault for employer benefits, but third-party negligence uses comparative fault: Idaho bars recovery if you're 50%+ at fault, reduces otherwise. Prove duty breach, causation, damages.[2] Key factors: witness accounts, expert reconstruction, scene evidence; jury assigns percentages. Identify equipment makers/contractors early, file separate PI suit; coordinate with comp lien. Fault splits affect net payout.
